adds: Direction-aware execution (RESTORATION of OctaFx addendum line-17, NOT a new cost model): SELL fills at bid (= ask - per-bar RESEARCH spread column); BUY fills at ask. P&L formula (exit-entry)*dir*units UNCHANGED.
SELL-side fills = {short entry} + {long exit: SL/TP/partial/signal/forced}; all other fills stay at ask.
invariants: Canonical per-bar order (in-position): SL/TP -> partial -> stop_mutation -> check_exit
Partial guard: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001
Stop mutation is monotone: long tightens up only, short tightens down only; silent reject otherwise
Entry market state initial_stop_price is FROZEN; stop_price_active is live-mutable
No-hook strategies produce byte-equivalent trade dicts to v1.5.7 (and v1.5.6)
unrealized_r (close-based) is UNCHANGED from v1.5.7 — additive only
spread=0 (all RESEARCH until the CLEAN->RESEARCH embed regen) -> byte-equivalent to v1.5.8.
known_limitations: NO margin-call / liquidation (inherited from v1.5.8/v1.5.9; this is a fill-price-only change). Under leveraged sizing (granular_parity / vol_parity) a basket can run to NEGATIVE equity intra-run instead of being liquidated at the stake, so modeled net%/maxDD% can exceed 100% or show a fictitious recovery. Backtest-FIDELITY only: live trades at fixed 0.01 lot are broker-margined and notional sizing is mathematically bounded (the floor is a no-op there). MITIGATION (required for leveraged cohorts, e.g. the granular_parity cointegration baseline): analysis-layer floor tools/leverage_liquidation_adjust.py -> net=-100 / maxDD=100 / ret_dd=-1 when maxDD>100% (trough equity < 0), wired into tools/cointegration_aggregator.py. Ref: outputs/system_reports/06_strategy_research/SZVP_LEVERAGE_FORENSIC.md (2026-06-04).
